skills.name: workflow-router
skills.trigger: Freeform non-trivial request without explicit skill
skills.runtime_notes: Default entrypoint; load full skill only when routing is needed.

skills.name: product-studio
skills.trigger: Product strategy, discovery, JTBD, prioritization, roadmap, or deciding what should exist

skills.name: create-epic
skills.trigger: Large initiative needing research, appetite, phases, or multiple PRDs

skills.name: create-prd
skills.trigger: Feature/ticket/spec needs formal PRD before implementation

skills.name: generate-pm-ticket
skills.trigger: User needs a backlog/Jira-style ticket rather than full PRD

skills.name: discovery-process
skills.trigger: Product discovery cycle from hypothesis to experiments

skills.name: jobs-to-be-done
skills.trigger: Clarify customer jobs, pains, and gains

skills.name: prioritization-advisor
skills.trigger: Choose prioritization framework or scoring approach

skills.name: product-strategy-session
skills.trigger: End-to-end product strategy across positioning/discovery/roadmap

skills.name: roadmap-planning
skills.trigger: Turn strategy into roadmap or release sequence

skills.name: user-story
skills.trigger: Convert needs into user stories and Gherkin acceptance criteria

skills.name: workshop-facilitation
skills.trigger: PM workflow needs one-question-at-a-time facilitation

skills.name: implement-prd
skills.trigger: Approved PRD needs implementation

skills.name: prd-readiness-review
skills.trigger: `implement-prd` needs readiness/go-stop review

skills.name: codebase-discovery
skills.trigger: `implement-prd` needs targeted codebase discovery

skills.name: implementation-slicing
skills.trigger: `implement-prd` needs executable slice plan

skills.name: implementation-skill-matcher
skills.trigger: `implement-prd` needs slice-to-pattern-skill matching after slicing and before coding
skills.runtime_notes: Owned by `implement-prd`; classifies reusable knowledge/capabilities without changing slice ownership.

skills.name: backend-phase-implementer
skills.trigger: Backend slice assigned by implementation plan
skills.runtime_notes: Owned by `implement-prd`; writes assigned backend files only.

skills.name: frontend-phase-implementer
skills.trigger: Frontend slice assigned by implementation plan
skills.runtime_notes: Owned by `implement-prd`; writes assigned frontend files only.

skills.name: acceptance-test-engineer
skills.trigger: Acceptance criteria require focused tests

skills.name: contract-verifier
skills.trigger: Backend response feeds frontend or API contract changes
skills.runtime_notes: Bridges quality validation and standards/pattern procedure.

skills.name: validation-runner
skills.trigger: `implement-prd` needs focused validation/failure triage

skills.name: qa-handoff-review
skills.trigger: Final fresh-context QA is required for implementation handoff

skills.name: document-development
skills.trigger: Feature/system is complete and needs durable internal documentation

skills.name: playwright-testing
skills.trigger: User asks for Playwright tests or E2E validation is required

skills.name: react-doctor
skills.trigger: Meaningful React changes need post-change audit
skills.runtime_notes: External command/tool availability follows runtime/tool policy.

skills.name: engineering-mentor
skills.trigger: Task benefits from teaching, challenge, and better engineering judgment
skills.runtime_notes: Overlay only; does not replace primary workflow.

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.trigger: Need early visual direction or aesthetic shaping

skills.name: impeccable
skills.trigger: UI/design craft, audit, polish, redesign, live visual iteration
skills.runtime_notes: May use external design tooling; see integrations contract for install/attach requests.

skills.name: pr-comments-resolution
skills.trigger: Resolve or review PR comments in an orderly way

skills.name: cavecrew
skills.trigger: User asks to delegate to cavecrew or use caveman-compressed subagents

skills.name: cavecrew-investigator
skills.trigger: Need compressed read-only code location or pattern lookup

skills.name: cavecrew-builder
skills.trigger: Need surgical 1-2 file mechanical edit with known scope

skills.name: cavecrew-reviewer
skills.trigger: Need terse diff/file review
skills.runtime_notes: Helper delegate; review only unless assigned otherwise.

skills.name: caveman
skills.trigger: User asks for caveman mode/less tokens, or installed runtime selects quality-preserving token-saving mode
skills.runtime_notes: External optional communication capability; use only when clarity is preserved.

skills.name: caveman-commit
skills.trigger: User asks for commit message or staging/commit helper output

skills.name: caveman-compress
skills.trigger: User asks to compress a memory/instruction file
skills.runtime_notes: Rewrites target memory file and creates backup per skill.

skills.name: caveman-help
skills.trigger: User asks for caveman help or command reference

skills.name: caveman-review
skills.trigger: User asks for compressed PR/code review comments

skills.name: caveman-stats
skills.trigger: User invokes `/caveman-stats` for real token usage stats

pattern_skills.name: add-project-pattern
pattern_skills.trigger: User asks to create/register project-specific pattern skills in repo overlay
pattern_skills.runtime_notes: Bootstrap helper for local pattern authoring and registry sync.
